query: SELECT configKey, CASE WHEN isSensitive = 1 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue, 6), '...', RIGHT(configValue, 4)) ELSE configValue END AS configValue, updatedAt FROM platform_config WHERE configKey LIKE 'TWILIO%' ORDER BY configKey;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT configKey, CASE WHEN isSensitive = 1 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(configValue, 6), '...', RIGHT(configValue, 4)) ELSE configValue END AS configValue, updatedAt FROM platform_config WHERE configKey LIKE 'TWILIO%' ORDER BY configKey;
